query: creamy spinach and ricotta spaghetti with lemon, garlic, and parmesan

draft.title: Creamy Spinach and Ricotta Spaghetti
draft.description: Creamy spaghetti with ricotta, spinach, garlic, lemon, and parmesan, perfect for a quick and rich Italian-inspired meal.

steps.text: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente.
While pasta cooks, heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add chopped spinach to the pan and cook until wilted, about 3-4 minutes. Season with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Drain the spaghetti, reserving about 100 ml of pasta water.
Add the drained spaghetti to the pan with spinach. Stir in ricotta, lemon zest, and lemon juice.
Add reserved pasta water a little at a time to loosen the sauce and create a creamy texture.
Mix in grated parmesan cheese and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with extra parmesan if desired.
